title: Accept open-source maximum-leverage research pack; zero production code mutation
summary: Admit non-invasive research pack documenting open-source toolchain catalog, mobile scan pipeline, capture SOP, ICP/QA gates, vPIC resolver rules, mathematical methods (WLS/RANSAC/symmetry), quantum REFERENCE_ONLY disposition, and 90-day backlog. Metric isolation locked: NeRF/splats VISUALIZATION_ONLY; metrics via scale-anchored Open3D/COLMAP+AprilTags. Configuration quarantine until vPIC+label match CFG-2019-F450-REG-CAB-4X2-60CA-DRW. Quantum/QAOA rejected from active pipeline. Backlog is planning only — sprint tasks not executed. Zero production code mutation in this pass.
honesty: Accuracy envelopes are capability assessments not VEH-000001 measurements
Quantum timings illustrative — not EDTS lab runs
Do not invent GVWR/GAWR defaults; physical label intake still required
